steps.t: Legolas, Aragorn, and Gimli have fought through the city to the docks. Legolas is waiting to speak with you concerning the number of allies you might …
Aragorn is on the docks of Pelargir, waiting to storm the Night-jewel in search of Balakhôr.
The Corsairs have enslaved the people of Gondor as they moved up the coast toward Pelargir. Now it is time to free these slaves from the benches to wh…
Umer has come out onto the deck of the Night-jewel, ready to face you at last.
Aragorn has returned to the deck of the Night-jewel, unable to find Balakhôr below-decks.
Balakhôr has been defeated, and now Aragorn wishes to speak with you on the deck of the Night-jewel.
The Corsairs have been defeated and Pelargir retaken. One task remains. Gimli wishes to speak with you about the next step Aragorn plans to take.
The Dead Men have departed, and now Aragorn wishes to speak with you.
